# IndiaSwiss

> The definitive guide for 30,000+ Indians living in Switzerland — community, food, business, culture, and practical living resources.

IndiaSwiss is a community information hub connecting Indian expats across all 26 Swiss cantons. Content covers associations, temples, restaurants, business networks, and practical guides for Indian nationals settling in Switzerland.

## Site Structure

- [Home](https://indiaswiss.ch): Overview and navigation hub for the Swiss Indian community
- [Community](https://indiaswiss.ch/community): 150+ Indian associations, spiritual centres, women's networks, and student groups
  - [Associations & Clubs](https://indiaswiss.ch/community/associations): Umbrella bodies (IAGZ, SICC), regional language, professional and cultural associations
  - [Temples & Spiritual](https://indiaswiss.ch/community/spiritual): Hindu temples, yoga centres (Art of Living, Isha, Brahma Kumaris), satsang groups
  - [Women's Network](https://indiaswiss.ch/community/women): Community networks, official support (FIZ, EBG), and practical tips for Indian women
  - [Students](https://indiaswiss.ch/community/students): ETH, EPFL, UZH, UNIGE guides, scholarships, InSAZ, student visa information
- [Food & Dining](https://indiaswiss.ch/food): Indian restaurants, groceries, catering, and cooking in Switzerland
  - [Restaurants](https://indiaswiss.ch/food/restaurants): Indian restaurants by city — Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, Lausanne
  - [Grocery](https://indiaswiss.ch/food/grocery): Indian grocery stores and spice shops; indiasupermarkt.ch online
  - [Catering](https://indiaswiss.ch/food/catering): Tiffin services and event catering across Switzerland
  - [Cooking Classes](https://indiaswiss.ch/food/cooking): Community workshops, private chefs, and online resources
- [Culture & Arts](https://indiaswiss.ch/culture): Festivals (Diwali, Holi, Navratri), dance schools, music groups, Indian fashion
- [Events](https://indiaswiss.ch/events): Swiss-Indian community event calendar 2026
- [Business & Career](https://indiaswiss.ch/business): Professional networks (SICC, TiE), job portals, top employers, work permit guide
- [Living in Switzerland](https://indiaswiss.ch/living): Practical guides for Indian residents
  - [Welcome Guide](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/welcome): First steps — Gemeinde registration, SIM, health insurance, bank account
  - [Housing](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/housing): Rental market, required documents, portals (Homegate, ImmoScout24)
  - [Banking](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/banking): Swiss banks, digital banks (Neon), money transfers to India (Wise)
  - [Healthcare](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/healthcare): KVG/LAMal insurance, insurers (CSS, Helsana), models, emergency numbers
  - [Education](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/education): Swiss school system, international schools (ZIS, Ecolint, ISB), Indian language schools
  - [Transport](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/transport): SBB trains, Half-Fare Travelcard, GA pass, city networks (ZVV, TPG)
  - [Legal & Permits](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/legal): L/B/C/G permits, OCI cards, passport renewal, naturalization
  - [Language Learning](https://indiaswiss.ch/living/language): German/French courses, Migros Klubschule, VHS, language apps
- [City Guides](https://indiaswiss.ch/cities): Indian community guides by Swiss city
  - [Zurich](https://indiaswiss.ch/cities/zurich): 18,000+ Indians — IAGZ, ETH students, restaurants, neighbourhoods
  - [Geneva](https://indiaswiss.ch/cities/geneva): 5,000+ Indians — UN professionals, CERN scientists, IAG community
  - [Basel](https://indiaswiss.ch/cities/basel): 3,000+ Indians — Novartis/Roche pharma professionals, ICAS
  - [Bern](https://indiaswiss.ch/cities/bern): 2,000+ Indians — Embassy of India, federal capital community
  - [Lausanne](https://indiaswiss.ch/cities/lausanne): 1,500+ Indians — EPFL students and researchers
- [Resources](https://indiaswiss.ch/resources): Curated official links — Embassy of India, SEM permits, health insurance, SBB, banking

## Key Facts

- Indian population in Switzerland: ~30,000
- Largest city community: Zurich (~18,000)
- Primary associations: IAGZ (Zurich), SICC (business), IAG (Geneva)
- Embassy of India, Berne: +41 31 351 1110 | indembassybern.gov.in
- Consulate General of India, Zurich: +41 44 253 2800 | cgizurich.gov.in
- Consulate General of India, Geneva: +41 22 906 8686 | cgigeneva.gov.in
